text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Which shaved ice should I get? ♪ Maybe pineapple since it's
summer? Oh, but kiwi sounds good too...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... They all look delicious! I need to take a closer look at the
menu. I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Smart Falcon and I are at the academy's summer camp,
taking a quick break between training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What's the point of going somewhere for summer training camp, when all I see is dirt, dirt, and more dirt! Give me a change of scenery for once!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the blue, I hear a deep sigh. I look back and see a
familiar-looking runner kicking at the dirt around her.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm baaack! ☆ I think I'm gonna go with the Happy Hawaiian Blue
flavor this time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of my observations, Smart Falcon returns from checking
out the menu, so we head to the cashier to buy our shaved ice.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew! Another great day of training! Nothing like a frozen treat to get you motivated!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's going on over there? Seems like there's a huge crowd
gathering.
choice_data_list: Why don't we go take a look?
Why don't we go take a look?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon and I head toward the crowd to see what's going on.
Once we get there...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: What do I do? What do I do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A group of trainers and their Umamusume trainees surround a lone
trainer. The young man appears to be panicking, unable to decide
what to do next.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wonder what happened here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her guess is as good as mine, so I decide to ask the trainers there to
shed light on the situation.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
W-we've got an emergency on our hands! Break time's over, and my
trainee hasn't come back yet!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She isn't responding to our attempts to contact her, even though the
sun's about to set. If she isn't back before dark, she may end up lost.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh no! We've got to hurry up and find her! C'mon, let's get moving!
choice_data_list: Right, we should help look for her.
Right, we should help look for her.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Correct. This isn't the time to be panicking. Let's split into multiple
search parties. Do you know where she might've gone?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Thank you all so much! Uhhh, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After determining the trainee's potential locations, each party goes
their own way to search. As we head to our assigned spot...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're at the far end of the beach. It doesn't seem like anybody's
here...
choice_data_list: We can't rule this place out just yet.
We can't rule this place out just yet.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, maybe she went out for a walk and ended up going super far.
Sometimes that happens.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, now that we're here, we should get started on our search! I'll
check the areas that are farther out! Y'know, since running on sand is
my thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager to look for the lost Umamusume, Smart Falcon dashes off into
the distance before I can say anything.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
(Is she over here? Or is she that way? Hrk... I ran so fast I forgot to
pay attention to where I am...)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
(But I agreed to help, so I have to do whatever I can! Full speed
ahead—max power! ☆ Let's gooo!)

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that... Falco? Why is she running here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk for what feels like an eternity, but I'm unable to find Smart
Falcon or the missing Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
How's your search going?! I've looked up and down the beach, but I
couldn't find her!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: I see... Dang it! Where do we even look next?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clock continues ticking down as our search hits a wall. We need
to find her before sundown, no matter what. Just as we ponder what
to do next...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm baaaaack!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've returned for your heart! ☆ No matter how far away I go, make
sure to catch me! ♪ 'Cause I'm the number one Umadol—Smart
Falcon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given that her body's completely covered in sand, I assume that
Smart Falcon has been running a fair bit. Behind her, I spot the
missing trainee.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainerrr! I thought I told you to call me Falco! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Eheheh... Sorry for making you worry. I was too caught up in the
moment, y'know? I just had to go all out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently the missing trainee had gotten lost after wandering a bit
too far. It's thanks to Smart Falcon that she was able to find her way
back.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aw, I wanted to train some more after changing, but it's already
dark...

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's up? Wait, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we were on flag duty together, remember? We both have an
aptitude for dirt racing... To tell you the truth, I was never happy
about that... until now.

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
When I saw you running earlier, you looked so happy! It's like you
were glowing under the sun! It made me think to myself, "Hey, dirt
racing might not be half bad!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After sharing her words of gratitude with Smart Falcon, the thankful
Umamusume heads off with a dash.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Her eyes... They were sparkling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And she was looking straight at me... Ehehe, I think I might have
another fan!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone gave everything for their performances, and it inspired all
the people watching!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that amazing? It makes me want to light up the world for other
people too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I guess it doesn't matter how you do things as long as give it your all!
This calls for a celebration! To my second fan ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Time to show the world my lovely smile! ♪ I'm Smart Falcon, and I'm
the cutest Umadol around! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once Smart Falcon sets her mind on something, there's nothing that
can stop her from racing toward that goal. She's got charisma and
determination in spades. To put it simply...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what?! You're supposed to call me cute! I'm going to pretend
you never said that. Now one more time from the top!
Remember—cute, not cool!
